mapper.select:
select typeValue, type from ( select distinct upper(source_type) as typeValue , 'sourceType' as type from task_run_analyze
1 = 1
union all select distinct upper(source_table_project) as typeValue , 'sourceTableProject' as type from task_run_analyze
1 = 1
union all select distinct upper(TARGET_TYPE) as typeValue , 'targetType' as type from task_run_analyze
1 = 1
union all select distinct upper(TARGET_TABLE_PROJECT) as typeValue , 'targetTypeProject' as type from task_run_analyze
1 = 1
)

select t1.node_id as nodeId, t1.node_name as nodeName, t2.source_type as sourceType, source_table_name as sourceTableName, source_table_project as sourceTableProject, target_type as targetType, target_table_name as targetTableName, target_table_project as targetTableProject, to_char(create_time, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as createTime, to_char(begin_running_time, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as beginRunningTime, to_char(finish_time, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as finishTime, task_total_time as taskTotalTime, TASK_AVERAGE_TRAFFIC as taskAverageTraffic, RECORD_WRITING_SPEED as recordWritingSpeed, READ_RECORDS as readRecords, READ_FAILURE_RECORDS as readFailureRecords, to_number(READ_RECORDS) - to_number(READ_FAILURE_RECORDS) as writeRecords from(select DISTINCT task_id, node_id , node_name,create_time, begin_running_time, finish_time from m_flow_three where node_id = #{nodeId} and BEGIN_RUNNING_TIME >= to_date(#{taskOpenDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') and FINISH_TIME <= to_date(#{taskEndDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')) t1 left join task_run_analyze t2 on t1.task_id = t2.task_id

select t1.node_name as nodeName, t2.source_type as sourceType, source_table_name as sourceTableName, source_table_project as sourceTableProject, target_type as targetType, target_table_name as targetTableName, target_table_project as targetTableProject, to_char(create_time, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as createTime, to_char(begin_run_time, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as beginRunningTime, to_char(finish_time, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as finishTime, task_total_time as taskTotalTime, TASK_AVERAGE_TRAFFIC as taskAverageTraffic, RECORD_WRITING_SPEED as recordWritingSpeed, READ_RECORDS as readRecords, READ_FAILURE_RECORDS as readFailureRecords, to_number(READ_RECORDS) - to_number(READ_FAILURE_RECORDS) as writeRecords from(select DISTINCT INSTANCE_ID||HISTORY_ID as task_id , node_name,create_time, begin_run_time, finish_time from m_flow where node_name = #{nodeName} and begin_run_time >= to_date(#{taskOpenDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') and FINISH_TIME <= to_date(#{taskEndDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') ) t1 left join task_run_analyze t2 on t1.task_id = t2.task_id
